---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about codebase layout, architecture, or custom configurations
title: 'question: [Brief summary of your question]'
labels: ['question', 'documentation']
assignees: []

---

**What would you like to know or clarify?**
A clear and detailed description of your question or the system behavior you'd like to understand.

**Is this related to a specific part of the codebase?**
Specify the file path, package, or configuration:
- [ ] Apps (`apps/web` or `apps/api`)
- [ ] Packages (`execution-engine`, `visualization-core`, `ai-core`, `shared-models`, `ui-components`)
- [ ] Infrastructure (`docker`, `monitoring`, `nginx`, `scripts`)
- [ ] Documentation / Roadmap
- [ ] Other

**Context / Reference Links**
Add links to relevant files or lines of code in the repository if applicable.
- e.g. [architecture-blueprint](file:///c:/Users/dell/OneDrive/Desktop/CODING/vizorix/ARCHITECTURE.md)
